name: Jamaican Jungle Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chopped walnuts or almonds or pecans (toasted)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, oats, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
2. Add coconut and chopped nuts to the same bowl and stir until combined.
3. In a medium bowl, combine bananas, pineapple, vegetable oil, and eggs. Mix until well combined.
4. Pour the banana mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined—do not overmix.
5. Grease a baking pan and pour in the batter.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 50 minutes.
7. For the glaze, mix confectioners' sugar with butter in a small bowl until smooth.
8. Stir in either coconut or vanilla extract to taste.
9. Add milk to achieve desired consistency.
10. Pour the glaze over the warm bread and allow it to set before serving.
11. Makes one loaf.
